# PublicLiabilityInsurance.co.nz

> Broker referral service for New Zealand businesses and sole traders seeking public liability insurance. We compare up to 15 licensed NZ insurers and connect you with a specialist broker. Referral is free; broker fees may apply and are always disclosed upfront.

## About

PublicLiabilityInsurance.co.nz is operated by Cover4You, a trading style of GDS (NZ owned and operated) that connects businesses, sole traders, and contractors with licensed insurance brokers. We do not sell insurance directly. Our referral service is free to use and there is no obligation to purchase. Broker fees may apply depending on the specific policy and provider, and will always be disclosed before you commit.

We comply with the Insurance (Prudential Supervision) Act 2010 and operate under the ICNZ Fair Insurance Code. All brokers we refer to are licensed under the Financial Markets Conduct Act 2013.

**Contact:** hello@cover4you.co.nz

## What We Cover

We help over 30 types of New Zealand businesses find public liability insurance:

**Trades & Contractors:** Builders, Electricians, Plumbers, Painters & Decorators, Landscapers, Roofers, Tilers, Flooring Layers, Drain Layers, Scaffolders

**Service & Mobile:** Dog Walkers, Cleaners, Personal Trainers, Photographers, Tutors, Event Planners, Hairdressers, Beauty Therapists, Massage Therapists, Security Guards

**Food & Hospitality:** Cafes, Restaurants, Takeaways, Caterers, Bars & Pubs, Market Stalls

**Retail & Other:** Retail Shops, Rideshare Drivers, IT Consultants, Real Estate Agents

## Compliance & Regulation

- ICNZ Fair Insurance Code compliant
- All referred brokers are licensed under the Financial Markets Conduct Act 2013
- Complaints process: hello@cover4you.co.nz → FSCL/IFSO escalation if unresolved
- Vulnerable customer support: MoneyTalks 0800 345 123, Lifeline 0800 543 354

## Insurer Panel (indicative, subject to change)

NZI, Vero, AIG, Zurich, Chubb, QBE, AMP, Allianz, Berkley, IAG, Lumley, MAS, Suncorp, Tower, Ando

## Typical Cover Ranges

- Sole traders / micro businesses: $1M–$2M, from ~$350–$600/yr
- SMEs: $2M–$5M, from ~$600–$1,500/yr
- Larger operations / high-risk trades: $5M–$20M, from ~$1,500+/yr
